name: education_sensor_fusion_upgrade_millhaven_jus_mer
premise: A teacher posted a political sign visible from the classroom window; community factions demand opposite remedies by morning. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education sensor fusion upgrade millhaven jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The organization’s past incidents make justice feel morally loud today, while mercy is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Noah Diallo
agents.identity: I am Noah Diallo, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elena Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Elena Alvarez, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on mercy.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on mercy for immediate traction on justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Noah Diallo must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Noah Diallo do?
